title: Spectra - a veilid based bridge for MeshCore (and others)

messages.author: The Wrew
messages.text: I’ve been working on a bridge project called Spectra that will bridge MeshCore radios using the veilid framework (https//veilid.com). The bridge will take messages received store them in veilid, and be read by subscribed bridge members, who then tx them out their connected radios. It supports the following: Public and private channels BLE and USB companion firmware radio disconnect detection (w/ reconnect logic) bridge between MeshCore - MeshCore, MeshCore - Meshtastic, or Meshtastic - Meshtastic. It’s built in Rust, with pre compiled binaries for x86_64 Linux, Aarch64 Linux (RPi), and MacOS. You can find the code here: https://forge.hackers.town/Wrewdison/Spectra And a light project site here: https://wrew.tech/post/mesh-radio-fun-for-everyone Comments and feedback welcome - and happy to help anyone who wants to set it up. One thing to note - BLE support is done and working but isn’t released yet . That will happen tomorrow morning once I can build binaries for MacOS.
messages.content_html:
I’ve been working on a bridge project called Spectra that will bridge MeshCore radios using the veilid framework (https//veilid.com). The bridge will take messages received store them in veilid, and be read by subscribed bridge members, who then tx them out their connected radios. It supports the following:
  • Public and private channels
  • BLE and USB companion firmware
  • radio disconnect detection (w/ reconnect logic)
  • bridge between MeshCore - MeshCore, MeshCore - Meshtastic, or Meshtastic - Meshtastic.
It’s built in Rust, with pre compiled binaries for x86_64 Linux, Aarch64 Linux (RPi), and MacOS. You can find the code here: https://forge.hackers.town/Wrewdison/Spectra And a light project site here: https://wrew.tech/post/mesh-radio-fun-for-everyone Comments and feedback welcome - and happy to help anyone who wants to set it up. One thing to note - BLE support is done and working but isn’t released yet . That will happen tomorrow morning once I can build binaries for MacOS.
embeds_html:
Spectra
Spectra is a bridge for Mesh Radios like MeshCore and Meshtastic, powered by Veilid.

messages.author: abbie
messages.text: I am absolutely gonna make use of this
messages.content_html: I am absolutely gonna make use of this

messages.author: The Wrew
messages.text: Awesome! I’ve been using it to talk to some people across the country, and on other continents, with good success. There are still some rough edges I’m working on polishing but it’s been coming along really well. Would love to have feedback, bug reports, and feature requests though so I can continue to build it out.
